text.autoconfig.openziti.title: OpenZiti MC
text.autoconfig.openziti.option.identity: Path to your enrolled OpenZiti identity .json.
text.autoconfig.openziti.option.serverEn: Host your server over OpenZiti. Off = client-only (you can still join others).
text.autoconfig.openziti.option.serviceN: Service to bind on. Used only when the server is enabled above.
text.autoconfig.openziti.option.zrokShar: Not yet wired. zrok backend ships in v0.3.0.
zrok support is a placeholder. Backend lands in v0.3.0; setting this today does nothing.
